text:
CDB actively explores the development of
                                                                                                                    grassroots party organizations, adheres to the combination of tradi-
                                                                                                                    tional Chinese culture with the party’s mission, the combination of
                                                                                                                    political party building with business building and the combination
                                                                                                                    of political party’s ideology advantage, political advantage, organi-
                                                                                                                    zation, and coordination strengths with the advantages of bank
                                                                                                                    financing. We should utilize party construction to promote the
                                                                                                                    development of the bank and use the development of the bank to test
                                                                                                                    the party construction, making party building and bank building
                                                                                                                    integrate in goals and measures so as to strengthen the function of
                                                                                                                    grassroots party organizations.
